nancy.zone_needs: Mayor, this zone will evolve automatically once its citizens are satisfied. Right now, they need: {needs}.
nancy.zone_ok: Excellent! All services are provided. This zone will upgrade through natural growth!
nancy.zone_max: Mayor, this zone has reached its maximum potential. It's thriving!
nancy.infra_max: Mayor, this building has reached its full potential. It's running perfectly!
nancy.infra_no_workers: Warning! This facility is only running at {ratio}% capacity. We need more citizens to staff it!
nancy.infra_no_money: To upgrade this structure to level {next}, we need {cost}$. The treasury isn't ready yet!
nancy.infra_no_resources: To reach level {next}, we're missing: {missing}. Keep your industries running!
nancy.infra_ready: Everything is in order! Click 'Upgrade' to reach level {next} and boost our output!
nancy.infra_default: I'm keeping a close eye on this building, Mayor.
